stemHtml: A signal sent by radiotelephony consisting of the words "MAYDAY MAYDAY MAYDAY" means..

options.a: the aircraft has a very urgent message to transmit concerning the safety of a ship, aircraft or vehicle.
options.b: imminent danger threatens the aircraft and immediate assistance is required.
options.c: the aircraft is forced to perform a fuel dumping procedure.
options.d: the aircraft has a message to transmit concerning adverse weather conditions along its route.
